creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
installed nagios-devel (3.01) installed nagios-snmp plugins.

installed silfreed plugins, with:

make install WITH_EXPECT_TOOLS=yes


failed here.
install: /var/ports/var/jails/basejail/usr/ports/net-mgmt/nagios-silfreed-plugins/work/check_max_clients_route-0.1.6/README: No such file or directory
*** Error code 71 (ignored)

installed again with -i:

make -i install WITH_EXPECT_TOOLS=yes

install: /var/ports/var/jails/basejail/usr/ports/net-mgmt/nagios-silfreed-plugins/work/check_max_clients_route-0.1.6/README: No such file or directory
*** Error code 71 (ignored)
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /var/ports/var/jails/basejail/usr/ports/net-mgmt/nagios-silfreed-plugins/work/check_pm3_clients_route-0.1.0/README /usr/local/share/doc/nagios-silfreed-plugins/check_pm3_clients_route-0.1.0.README
install: /var/ports/var/jails/basejail/usr/ports/net-mgmt/nagios-silfreed-plugins/work/check_pm3_clients_route-0.1.0/README: No such file or directory
*** Error code 71 (ignored)
===>   Registering installation for nagios-silfreed-plugins-1.1

How-To-Repeat: install nagios-devel (3.01) installed nagios-snmp plugins. (had to deinstall / reinstall nagios-snmp plugins)

install silfreed plugins, with:

make install WITH_EXPECT_TOOLS=yes
